name: agent-project-bootstrap
description: Scaffold a runtime-agnostic multi-agent project: one persona.yaml hydrates working personas on any AI coding agent (Claude Code, code-puppy, ...) via per-runtime adapters. Also includes the legacy Claude Code emit modes (vault-project, collab-repo-project, join-collab-project) and a sister skill — multi-agent-audit — for grading multi-agent projects against an evidence-based rubric (read-only).
